found_emails.text:
Autoform India
[https://res.cloudinary.com/dmwt4rg4m/image/upload/v1765531503/warranty-portal/autoform-logo.png]


APPLICATION UPDATE


HELLO ROHIT PATIL,

🔍


APPLICATION STATUS UPDATE

We've reviewed your warranty application and need to inform you that some
details require your attention.

After careful review of your warranty registration, we are unable to approve
your application in its current state. However, you can easily correct the
information and resubmit for approval.

REASON FOR REJECTION:

Require Picture through Camera/Gallery. Please Submit Again.


HOW TO FIX & RESUBMIT:

To activate your warranty, please follow these steps to correct and resubmit
your application:

 1. Login to Portal: Click the button below to access your dashboard.
 2. Edit Application: Find your rejected warranty and click "Edit & Resubmit".
 3. Update Details: Correct the information based on the reason provided above.

Fix & Resubmit Now [https://warranty2.autoformindia.co.in/login?mode=warranty]

Original Application Details:

Product: AMAZE+

UID: 26031602424705

Product Type: seat-cover

Vehicle Registration: MH-12-ZC-1617

Review Date: 22 Apr 2026

If you believe this decision was made in error or have any questions, please
contact our support team at marketing@autoformindia.com
[marketing@autoformindia.com].

Best regards,
Autoform India Team

© 2026 Autoform India. All rights reserved.

WELCOME TO AUTOFORM INDIA, MUKESH BHAI!

🎉


YOUR ACCOUNT HAS BEEN CREATED!

Your warranty registration has been submitted successfully.

📋 Registration Details:

Warranty ID: 261480004540587

Email: mukeshmaguda203@gmail.com

WHAT HAPPENS NEXT?

1. Store Verification

The store where you got your product installed will verify your registration.

2. Admin Approval

After store verification, our admin team will review and approve your warranty.

3. Warranty Activated

Once approved, you will receive a confirmation email with your warranty
certificate.

📌 How to Access Your Dashboard:

Use OTP-based login with your registered email (mukeshmaguda203@gmail.com) to
check your warranty status anytime.

marketing@autoformindia.com [marketing@autoformindia.com].

HELLO JIGNESH RATHWA,

✅


YOUR WARRANTY HAS BEEN APPROVED!

Your product is now covered under warranty

Great news! We're pleased to inform you that your warranty registration has been
reviewed and approved by our team.


HOW TO MANAGE YOUR WARRANTY:

You can now view, manage, and download your digital warranty certificates
directly from our portal. Follow these simple steps:

 1. Visit the Portal: Click the button below to go to the Autoform Warranty
    Portal.

    active warranty certificates anytime.

Product: D3

 * Your digital warranty certificate is only accessible via the portal

APPLICATION UPDATE


HELLO SHUBHAS BHAI,

🔍


APPLICATION STATUS UPDATE

We've reviewed your warranty application and need to inform you that some
details require your attention.

After careful review of your warranty registration, we are unable to approve
your application in its current state. However, you can easily correct the
information and resubmit for approval.

REASON FOR REJECTION:

Require Picture through Camera/Gallery. Please Submit Again.


HOW TO FIX & RESUBMIT:

To activate your warranty, please follow these steps to correct and resubmit
your application:

 1. Login to Portal: Click the button below to access your dashboard.
 2. Edit Application: Find your rejected warranty and click "Edit & Resubmit".
 3. Update Details: Correct the information based on the reason provided above.

🎉 WELCOME!


WELCOME TO AUTOFORM INDIA, LAKHWINDER SINGH!

🎉


YOUR ACCOUNT HAS BEEN CREATED!

Your warranty registration has been submitted successfully.

📋 Registration Details:

Warranty ID: 26010302405294

Email: lakhi_sran7@icloud.com

Status: Pending Store Verification


WHAT HAPPENS NEXT?

1. Store Verification

The store where you got your product installed will verify your registration.

2. Admin Approval

After store verification, our admin team will review and approve your warranty.

3. Warranty Activated

Once approved, you will receive a confirmation email with your warranty
certificate.

📌 How to Access Your Dashboard:

Use OTP-based login with your registered email (lakhi_sran7@icloud.com) to check
your warranty status anytime.

Access Your Dashboard [https://warranty2.autoformindia.co.in /login]

If you have any questions, please contact our support team at
marketing@autoformindia.com [marketing@autoformindia.com].

Best regards,
Autoform India Team

© 2026 Autoform India. All rights reserved.
